The lightning is perfect, game is scary, monster is well developed, i love the game, but only thing I don’t like is the players light, it’s not as good as I expected and doesn’t work in very dark lightning, but overall this game is amazing, 9.5/10

I love this game!!! 

But the thing is I downloaded it because I thought it would be the OLD primal fear map, songs and levels. I thought they would’ve had “the lobotomy” for the lobby theme. I have footage of the old game deep in my camera roll, level two and what it used to look like. So when I found it I thought it would’ve looked like that but no. It’s still a great game, nice developers, nice people and a great map that I love

reviews.review_title: Is there a way out of this game?
reviews.review_description: I've been looking for a way out for days but I only found a closed door. Is there really a way out of the cave or are we trapped?

I was browsing tiktok for scariest vr games and came across this game. I went in with my friends and tried to join a code. They were all able to get into a server together and i was left in the dust. No matter how many codes i try to join or how many times i reinstall it just wont work. So if i could get some assistance on how to fix this that would be awesome.

Thank you.

reviews.review_title: Is this the game jman played?
reviews.review_description: Put this as helpful if yes

BUGS AND WHAT THEY DO

ah, only 3 i've noticed so far... where do i start?

JUMPSCARE

 firstly, there is an bug where you can get double jumpscared- basically, it doesn't teleport you back to the respawn area.

FLASHLIGHT

sometimes, paired with the jumpscare glitch (which you can't prevent the jumpscare glitch, it's like an rng basically) you get your flashlight removed. it gets pure dark, so please fix it!!!

NOCLIP OUT OF MAP

sometimes when you get jumpscared, you just... noclip out the walls and you get out of the map? dunno what else to explain of it

AWESOME GAME

i love this game so much!!! but sometimes these glitches make me laugh, sometimes they bug me!! please fix them. :3 i love the graphics too!!! generally just an pure great game

-GABBY
Why is there 2 primal fear games
For some reason when the update came I couldn’t even load the game it would crash my game

This is fake. I have some plenty of proof. There is two versions of primal fear the one that got shut down on fall. And the second one getting shut down this month. If you’re looking to play primal fear, you can play the first one I mentioned which is still playable, but it will not receive updates. This is not real primal fear.
